narrative:
02 court of appeals district has 697,011 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.9% D−R vs -14.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
